category_sources: source_facts.description says daemonize runs a command as a UNIX daemon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the daemonize project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official daemonize project page and best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/bmc/daemonize, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it runs commands as UNIX daemons.
source_facts.executables lists the daemonize CLI executable.
